---
title: "MDX Article Reference Proof"
description: "MDX fixture for the article-reference data-path proof."
---

MDX can cite a source.[^cite-mdx-source]

MDX can also carry an explanatory note.[^note-mdx-context]

[^note-mdx-context]: This note has _rich_ Markdown, [a link](https://example.com/mdx-note), and `inline code`.

```tpm-bibtex
@article{mdx-source,
  author = {Source, MDX},
  title = {A citation with emphasis},
  year = {2026},
  url = {https://example.com/mdx-source}
}
```
